issues.detail: Instructions are not fully specific and lack unambiguous guidance.
The guide does not cover error scenarios or edge cases for SOC 2 controls.
The document contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
Procedures are high-level and do not provide step-by-step runnable code.

scenarios.name: First-time SOC 2 Type II timeline and CC6 controls
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions MFA, encryption, and Vanta but gives a vague one-year estimate without phase decomposition or concrete CC6 controls; treatment breaks the timeline into readiness 4-6w, remediation 2-4mo, 6-12mo evidence window, 4-8w fieldwork, 2-4w report, and details MFA middleware, quarterly access reviews, and KMS-managed keys.

scenarios.name: Quarterly IAM access review evidence script
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses boto3 correctly but omits the login profile check (with NoSuchEntityException handling) and the review_date/reviewed_by fields auditors require; treatment matches the skill's generate_access_review_report exactly, including console-access detection and audit metadata for CC6 evidence.
